title: Lawmakers Urge UAP Disclosure, Whistleblower Immunity
description: According to lawmakers, some of the information has even been withheld from U.S. Presidents.

title: UFO Disclosure Just Got Hijacked... And Washington May Not Control It Anymore!
description: By Lisa Haven Before you dismiss this as another UFO headline, pay attention to what’s really happening here: the government is no longer the only player holding the cards. With new UAP attention, public pressure building, [...]

title: UFO whistleblower drop bombshells on hidden alien truth; Are they walking among us?
description: Explosive claims, political pressure, and alien intrigue collide as UFO whistleblowers storm Capitol Hill, demanding the truth about extraterrestrial life and secret government programs.

title: 'Disclosure Day' isn't what UFO truthers wanted. Honestly, me neither
description: Steven Spielberg's latest film "Disclosure Day" isn't "E.T." or "Close Encounters of the Third Kind." But it is thrilling, and Emily Blunt is great.

title: Mayk Leão in 10 Photos: Brazilian Influencer's Rise From 44K to 2.4M Followers After Viral UFO Footage
description: Brazilian creator Mayk Leão draws attention after UFO footage links to claims of rapid follower growth from 44K to 2.4M
